Company Information

CRAVELLE sp. z o.o.

KRS: 0001224084

NIP: 5253079394

REGON: 54400465000000

Email: cravelle.co@protonmail.com

Phone: +48 729 420 936

Business hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–22:00

Cravelle is a commercial brand operated by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o., a company registered in Poland under the National Court Register (KRS).

About Our Services

Cravelle offers a range of professional services including education programmes, advisory support, translation, trade coordination, digital services, and consulting. Our services are designed to support individuals and organisations in navigating complex processes with clarity, professionalism, and discretion.

Advisory Nature of Services

Certain services provided by Cravelle are advisory in nature. In particular:

  • Cravelle does not provide legal representation and is not a law firm. Any guidance related to administrative or regulatory processes is provided as informational support, not legal advice.
  • Real estate services are strictly advisory. Cravelle does not act as a licensed real estate broker and does not provide investment advice or guarantee returns.
  • Diplomatic and mediation services involve consulting and facilitation only. Cravelle does not act as a legal representative for any party.
  • Outcomes of any process involving third parties (including authorities, universities, institutions, and platforms) are determined by those third parties. Cravelle cannot guarantee any specific result, approval, or outcome.

Contact

For general enquiries, legal matters, complaints, or data protection questions, please contact us at: cravelle.co@protonmail.com or call +48 729 420 936.
